hero.title: Professional Cleaning Services
hero.subtitle: Comfort Starts with a Clean Home.

services.title: Our Services
services.residential_detail: Our residential cleaning is tailored to your home and schedule. We clean every room with care, using products that are safe for your family and pets.

client_info.title: Want to become our client?
client_info.intro: Here's everything you need to know about how we work - simple, transparent, and professional.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.description: We start with a free home visit, where we:
how_it_works.pricing: During the visit, you'll receive a personalized price proposal - always a fixed price including VAT, after the RUT tax deduction.
how_it_works.rut_info: The RUT deduction is applied directly to your invoice, so you only pay the reduced amount. We take care of all administration with the tax office.
how_it_works.rut_note: If the RUT deduction is not approved, the full amount will be charged.

supplies.title: Cleaning supplies
supplies.description: We work with cleaning products that you provide. Our team can recommend products tailored to your home.
supplies.link: View our recommended cleaning list here.

important_info.title: Important information
important_info.description: To protect your home, we do not move heavy furniture such as:
items: sofas
large appliances
heavy furnishings
important_info.note: If you would like cleaning behind or underneath these items, please move them before our visit.
important_info.balcony: Balcony cleaning is not included in the standard service and can be booked separately.

insurance.title: Safety & insurance
insurance.description: We are insured through Trygg-Hansa, which means you are fully covered in case of any unexpected incidents, such as damage or lost keys.

agreement.title: Agreement
agreement.trial: Not sure yet? We also offer a trial cleaning with no commitment.

extra_services.title: Additional services
extra_services.pricing: If a service does not have a fixed price, it is charged hourly: 200 SEK/hour
extra_services.note: Note: This hourly rate does not apply to regular home cleaning services.

checklist.title: Cleaning checklist
items: dish soap
window cleaner (spray)
multi-surface cleaner (e.g. Jif/Cif/Vim)
toilet cleaner
kitchen sponges
dish brush
steel wool (Svinto)
floor cleaning solution
garbage bags
vacuum bags
vacuum cleaner
bucket + mop (preferably with a wringing system)

client_info.footer: We look forward to helping you create a clean, fresh, and comfortable home.

services.deep_clean_detail: A thorough top-to-bottom clean that covers areas often missed in regular cleaning. Perfect for spring cleaning, after renovation, or before/after an event.

about.title: About Us
about.text1: My name is Aleksandra, and I have over
about.text2: years of experience as a professional cleaner. For the past
about.text3: years, I have been successfully running my own cleaning services in Stockholm, building a strong reputation for reliability, high quality, and exceptional attention to detail.
about.text4: I specialize in premium home cleaning services tailored to each client's individual needs, including both regular maintenance cleaning and deep cleaning. My goal is to create clean, comfortable, and well-maintained living spaces where my clients can truly relax and feel at ease.
about.text5: Customer trust and safety are my top priorities. That is why I work in partnership with Trygg-Hansa. This provides full coverage in the unlikely event of accidental damage during cleaning or if keys are misplaced, giving my clients complete peace of mind.
about.text6: If you are looking for a reliable and experienced cleaner in Stockholm, I would be happy to help you keep your home spotless, fresh, and stress-free.
about.recommendations_modal_hint: Click any bubble to open the full review screenshot.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything clients usually ask before booking.
faq.q1: Do you bring your own cleaning supplies?
faq.a1: Yes. We can bring professional products and equipment. If you prefer specific products at home, we are happy to use those instead.
faq.q2: How long does a standard home cleaning take?
faq.a2: It depends on home size and condition. Most regular appointments take between 2 and 4 hours.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We offer one-time, weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly plans depending on your needs.
faq.a4: Yes. We cooperate with Trygg-Hansa, which helps cover accidental damage during service according to policy terms.
faq.a5: If you are eligible in Sweden, we handle the RUT process on the invoice so your tax deduction is applied directly.

residentialGuide.title: House Cleaning Guide
residentialGuide.subtitle: Everything you should know about our regular residential cleaning service.
residentialGuide.intro: This guide explains what is included in regular house cleaning and which limitations apply, so expectations stay clear for both sides.

section_a.title: What is included in our house cleaning

general_info.title: General information
items: We clean all surfaces and equipment that are easily accessible from floor level.
For safety reasons, we do not use ladders or step stools.
Cleaning above reachable height is included in deep cleaning, which is offered as an additional service.
We kindly ask that all cleaning equipment is fully functional (e.g. vacuum cleaner, mop). We do not work with damaged or non-functioning equipment.
If the necessary cleaning supplies are not provided, we reserve the right to skip certain tasks or leave specific areas uncleaned.

For safety reasons, we do not perform cleaning if a dog is left unsupervised in the home. Small household pets (such as cats, fish, or caged animals) may remain during the cleaning, provided they are secured and do not interfere with the service.
For safety and legal reasons, our staff cannot stay alone in the home with minors without a responsible adult present.
Please note that regular home cleaning is designed to maintain cleanliness, not restore heavily worn or neglected surfaces.
While we always work carefully and thoroughly, we are not able to make worn items look new.

kitchen.title: Kitchen
items: Cleaning of sink, countertops, and taps
Wiping tiles above the sink
Exterior cleaning of kitchen cabinet doors
Cleaning of all accessible surfaces (tables, chairs, windowsills, etc.)
Vacuuming skirting boards and edges
Spot cleaning of doors (removing visible stains)
Vacuuming and mopping floors
Cleaning the waste area under the sink
Emptying coffee machine (grounds/capsules) and rinsing the coffee pot
Cleaning the microwave (inside and outside), if easily accessible
Loading the dishwasher and unloading it once per visit
Disposal of garbage

bathroom_toilet.title: Bathroom & Toilet
items: Cleaning of shower, shower cabin, and bathtub
Cleaning of sink and toilet
Cleaning of accessible taps and pipes
Spot cleaning of walls and tiles (visible stains only)
Polishing mirrors
Exterior dusting of bathroom furniture and appliances
Vacuuming and mopping floors
Disposal of garbage

living_bedrooms.title: Living room & Bedrooms
items: Vacuuming floors, carpets, and skirting boards
Mopping floors
Dusting of furniture, lamps, windowsills, radiators, doors, frames, moldings, and accessible surfaces
Bed making (linen change available upon request)
Disposal of garbage

not_included.title: What is not included
items: We do not clean lamps unless they are easily accessible from floor level.
Crystal lamps and chandeliers are not cleaned under any circumstances.
We do not wash large amounts of dishes by hand (maximum approx. 15 minutes per visit).
Watering plants is not included in standard home cleaning. If you are away for a longer holiday and leave us a reminder, we can water your plants so they stay in good condition.
Laundry is not included in standard home cleaning. It can be booked as an additional service for an extra fee.
We do not provide household maintenance tasks, such as changing curtains, replacing light bulbs, or removing candle wax stains.
Need help with wardrobes and closets? Organization is available as an additional service for an extra fee.

pets.title: Pets
items: We do not clean after pets (e.g. litter boxes, cages, aquariums).
We do not feed animals or change their water.
We do not walk dogs.

furniture_handling.title: Furniture & handling
items: We do not move furniture or large appliances (e.g. refrigerators, washing machines).
We do not lift, shake, or beat carpets.

sensitive_surfaces.title: Sensitive surfaces
items: TV screens and other screens are cleaned using dry methods only.
Special cleaning products can be used only if provided by the customer and at the customer's responsibility.

additional_notes.title: Additional notes
items: When cleaning the fridge (extra service), we may dispose only of items that are visibly spoiled. We do not check expiry dates and we do not decide based on date labels.
Home cleaning applies only to indoor living areas (garages, storage rooms, yards, and similar spaces are not included).
Scrubbing of grout/joints is not included in standard cleaning (available as an additional service).
